summary: A Go-based modular orchestration and assertion runner with a plugin system, currently in active v0.4 development with session management tooling.
concerns: uncommitted changes (5 modified, 1 staged, 2 untracked) suggest instability
heavy reliance on automated session metadata commits indicates possible workflow friction
v0.4 tracking and worktree archiving in recent commits suggests complex multi-session development overhead
suggestions: commit or stash the current working tree changes to establish a clean baseline
investigate the v0.4 session tooling friction mentioned in commits to streamline developer experience
document the plugin system and schema definitions to aid adoption
